description: Executed TASK-FULL-CYCLE-TEST-0001 LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT implementation as roadmap step 11. Created governance/ledger-router-contract.md on main branch establishing comprehensive routing and governance framework: (1) Ledger Router component providing intelligent routing decisions based on task_id patterns, actor_role sequences, and event_type transitions; (2) Ledger Writer component ensuring structured ledger entry creation with schema v164 compliance, parent_event_id chains, and commit_sha references; (3) Next Actor Governance Contract defining role transition rules, routing decision basis requirements, and next_expected_event validation; (4) Router-Writer integration protocol ensuring all routing decisions are properly recorded in ledger with traceable decision basis; (5) Governance contract enforcement mechanisms preventing invalid actor transitions and ensuring proper event flow continuity. Complete routing and governance system operational for autonomous multi-agent DevOps coordination.
